sql:
SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'YYYY-MM') AS period_month,
    SUM(-tal.amount * t.exchangerate) AS revenue_base
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype = 'Income'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item_sku,
    i.displayname AS item_name,
    i.itemtype AS item_type,
    SUM(-tl.quantity) AS units_sold,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS revenue_base
FROM transactionline tl
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tl.transaction
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CashSale')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'NonInvtPart', 'Assembly', 'Kit', 'Service', 'OthCharge', 'DwnLdItem', 'GiftCert')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY i.itemid, i.displayname, i.itemtype
ORDER BY SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer_id,
    c.companyname AS customer_name,
    COUNT(t.id) AS invoice_count,
    SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) AS invoiced_revenue_base
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY c.entityid, c.companyname
ORDER BY SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY') || '-Q' || TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'Q') AS sales_quarter,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary_name,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS revenue_base
FROM transactionline tl
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tl.transaction
WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CashSale')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY') || '-Q' || TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'Q'), BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY') || '-Q' || TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'Q'), BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)

SELECT
    e.entityid AS sales_rep,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS invoice_count,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS revenue_base
FROM transactionline tl
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tl.transaction
JOIN employee e ON e.id = t.employee
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY e.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS order_month,
    COUNT(t.id) AS order_count,
    SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) AS total_booked_base,
    ROUND(SUM(t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) / COUNT(t.id), 2) AS avg_order_value_base
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS invoice_month,
    COUNT(t.id) AS invoice_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.entity) AS customers_billed
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer_id,
    c.companyname AS customer_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR')
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS ytd_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR'), -12)
             AND t.trandate <= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -12)
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS prior_ytd_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR')
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR'), -12)
               AND t.trandate <= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -12)
          THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS revenue_change
FROM transactionline tl
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tl.transaction
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CashSale')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR'), -12)
    AND t.trandate <= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
GROUP BY c.entityid, c.companyname
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR')
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) <> 0
    OR SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR'), -12)
             AND t.trandate <= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -12)
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) <> 0
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YEAR')
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS sales_month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CashSale')
        THEN -tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS gross_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'CustCred'
        THEN tl.netamount * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS credit_memo_total,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS net_revenue
FROM transactionline tl
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tl.transaction
WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CashSale', 'CustCred')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    t.tranid AS invoice_number,
    c.entityid AS customer,
    t.trandate AS invoice_date,
    t.duedate AS due_date,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status,
    t.foreignamountunpaid AS open_amount,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND t.foreignamountunpaid <> 0
ORDER BY t.duedate, c.entityid

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
        THEN t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS current_amt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
            AND NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 30
        THEN t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS days_1_30,
    SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 30
            AND NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 60
        THEN t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS days_31_60,
    SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 60
            AND NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 90
        THEN t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS days_61_90,
    SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 90
        THEN t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS days_over_90,
    SUM(t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate) AS total_open
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND t.foreignamountunpaid <> 0
GROUP BY c.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate) DESC

SELECT
    SUM(t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate) AS open_ar_base,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 91
        THEN t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END) AS invoiced_sales_91d_base,
    ROUND(
        SUM(t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate)
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 91
            THEN t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate ELSE 0 END), 0)
        * 91, 1) AS dso_days
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    c.email AS customer_email,
    t.tranid AS invoice_number,
    t.trandate AS invoice_date,
    t.duedate AS due_date,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.duedate AS days_overdue,
    t.foreignamountunpaid AS open_amount,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND t.foreignamountunpaid <> 0
    AND t.duedate < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
ORDER BY TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.duedate DESC, t.foreignamountunpaid DESC

SELECT
    t.tranid AS invoice_number,
    c.entityid AS customer,
    t.trandate AS invoice_date,
    t.duedate AS due_date,
    t.foreignamountunpaid AS open_amount,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency,
    t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate AS open_amount_base
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustInvc'
    AND t.foreignamountunpaid <> 0
ORDER BY t.foreignamountunpaid * t.exchangerate DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    t.trandate AS tran_date,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.type) AS tran_type,
    t.tranid AS document_number,
    t.foreigntotal AS signed_amount,
    t.foreignamountunpaid AS open_amount,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred', 'CustPymt')
    AND t.trandate BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY c.entityid, t.trandate, t.tranid

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    COUNT(t.id) AS payment_count,
    SUM(-t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) AS amount_received_base,
    MIN(t.trandate) AS first_payment_date,
    MAX(t.trandate) AS last_payment_date
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustPymt'
    AND t.trandate BETWEEN TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY c.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(-t.foreigntotal * t.exchangerate) DESC

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    t.tranid AS payment_number,
    t.trandate AS payment_date,
    -t.foreigntotal AS payment_amount,
    -t.foreignamountunpaid AS unapplied_amount,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'CustPymt'
    AND t.foreignamountunpaid <> 0
ORDER BY t.trandate

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS ar_balance_base
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = tal.transaction
    AND tl.id = tal.transactionline
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype = 'AcctRec'
GROUP BY c.entityid, BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)
HAVING SUM(tal.amount) >= 100
ORDER BY SUM(tal.amount) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.tranid AS bill_number,
    v.entityid AS vendor_id,
    v.companyname AS vendor_name,
    t.trandate AS bill_date,
    t.duedate AS due_date,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS bill_status,
    -t.foreigntotal AS bill_total,
    -t.foreignamountunpaid AS amount_due
FROM transaction t
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
    AND NVL(t.foreignamountunpaid, 0) <> 0
ORDER BY t.duedate, v.companyname

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor_id,
    v.companyname AS vendor_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) <= 0
        THEN -t.foreignamountunpaid ELSE 0 END) AS current_not_due,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) BETWEEN 1 AND 30
        THEN -t.foreignamountunpaid ELSE 0 END) AS days_1_30,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) BETWEEN 31 AND 60
        THEN -t.foreignamountunpaid ELSE 0 END) AS days_31_60,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) BETWEEN 61 AND 90
        THEN -t.foreignamountunpaid ELSE 0 END) AS days_61_90,
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - NVL(t.duedate, t.trandate) > 90
        THEN -t.foreignamountunpaid ELSE 0 END) AS days_over_90,
    SUM(-t.foreignamountunpaid) AS total_open
FROM transaction t
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type IN ('VendBill', 'VendCred')
    AND NVL(t.foreignamountunpaid, 0) <> 0
GROUP BY v.entityid, v.companyname
ORDER BY SUM(-t.foreignamountunpaid) DESC

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor_id,
    v.companyname AS vendor_name,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS net_gl_spend,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS transaction_count
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionaccountingline tal ON tal.transaction = t.id
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type IN ('VendBill', 'VendCred')
    AND tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype IN ('Expense', 'COGS', 'OthExpense')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY v.entityid, v.companyname
ORDER BY SUM(tal.amount) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.trandate AS payment_date,
    c.name AS currency_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS payment_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.entity) AS vendors_paid,
    SUM(ABS(t.foreigntotal)) AS total_paid
FROM transaction t
JOIN currency c ON c.id = t.currency
WHERE t.type = 'VendPymt'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY t.trandate, c.name
ORDER BY t.trandate DESC, c.name

SELECT
    t.duedate AS due_date,
    TRUNC(t.duedate) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS days_until_due,
    t.tranid AS bill_number,
    v.companyname AS vendor_name,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS bill_status,
    -t.foreignamountunpaid AS amount_due
FROM transaction t
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
    AND NVL(t.foreignamountunpaid, 0) <> 0
    AND t.duedate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)
    AND t.duedate <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 100
ORDER BY t.duedate, v.companyname

SELECT
    v.companyname AS vendor_name,
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS spend_month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'VendBill' THEN ABS(t.foreigntotal)
        ELSE -ABS(t.foreigntotal) END) AS net_spend,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS document_count
FROM transaction t
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type IN ('VendBill', 'VendCred')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY v.companyname, TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY v.companyname, TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    vs.vendor_name,
    vs.vendor_spend,
    tot.total_spend,
    ROUND(100 * vs.vendor_spend / tot.total_spend, 2) AS pct_of_total_spend
FROM (
    SELECT
        v.companyname AS vendor_name,
        SUM(-t.foreigntotal) AS vendor_spend
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
    WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
        AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    GROUP BY v.companyname
) vs,
(
    SELECT SUM(-t2.foreigntotal) AS total_spend
    FROM transaction t2
    WHERE t2.type = 'VendBill'
        AND t2.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        AND t2.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
) tot
ORDER BY vs.vendor_spend DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    p.periodname AS posting_period,
    a.acctnumber AS account_number,
    a.fullname AS bank_account,
    SUM(-tal.amount) AS cash_paid_out,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS payment_count
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionaccountingline tal ON tal.transaction = t.id
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod p ON p.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE t.type = 'VendPymt'
    AND tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype = 'Bank'
    AND p.isadjust = 'F'
    AND p.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND p.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY p.periodname, p.startdate, a.acctnumber, a.fullname
ORDER BY p.startdate, a.acctnumber

SELECT
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary_name,
    v.companyname AS vendor_name,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.department) AS department_name,
    SUM(tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS base_currency_spend,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS bill_count
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary), v.companyname, BUILTIN.DF(tl.department)
ORDER BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary), SUM(tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) DESC

SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    ap.startdate AS period_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount > 0 THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_debits,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount < 0 THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_credits,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS net_activity
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.acctnumber = '4000'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate
ORDER BY ap.startdate

SELECT
    a.accttype AS account_type,
    COUNT(tal.transaction) AS posted_line_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount > 0 THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_debits,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount < 0 THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_credits,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS net_debit_minus_credit
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND ap.periodname = 'Jan 2026'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
GROUP BY a.accttype
ORDER BY a.accttype

SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    ap.startdate AS period_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('Income', 'OthIncome') THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'COGS' THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS cogs,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('Income', 'OthIncome') THEN -tal.amount WHEN a.accttype = 'COGS' THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS gross_profit,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('Expense', 'OthExpense') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS operating_expense,
    SUM(-tal.amount) AS net_income
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype IN ('Income', 'OthIncome', 'COGS', 'Expense', 'OthExpense')
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate
ORDER BY ap.startdate

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS tran_month,
    t.type AS type_code,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.type) AS type_name,
    COUNT(t.id) AS tran_count
FROM transaction t
WHERE t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'), t.type, BUILTIN.DF(t.type)
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'), COUNT(t.id) DESC

SELECT
    t.trandate AS tran_date,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.type) AS tran_type,
    t.tranid AS document_number,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.entity) AS entity_name,
    ap.periodname AS posting_period,
    CASE WHEN tal.amount > 0 THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END AS debit,
    CASE WHEN tal.amount < 0 THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END AS credit,
    tal.amount AS signed_amount
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.acctnumber = '4000'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY t.trandate, t.id

SELECT
    a.acctnumber AS account_number,
    a.fullname AS account_name,
    a.accttype AS account_type,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS activity_month_1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS activity_month_2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS movement
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND (ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM')
        OR ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM'))
GROUP BY a.acctnumber, a.fullname, a.accttype
ORDER BY ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN ap.startdate = TRUNC(TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'MM') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END)) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.trandate AS tran_date,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.type) AS tran_type,
    t.tranid AS document_number,
    a.acctnumber AS account_number,
    a.fullname AS account_name,
    a.accttype AS account_type,
    tal.amount AS signed_amount,
    ABS(tal.amount) AS impact_magnitude,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND ap.periodname = 'Jan 2026'
ORDER BY ABS(tal.amount) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    ap.startdate AS period_start,
    NVL(BUILTIN.DF(tl.department), 'Unassigned') AS department_name,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS expense_amount
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = tal.transaction AND tl.id = tal.transactionline
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype IN ('Expense', 'OthExpense')
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate, NVL(BUILTIN.DF(tl.department), 'Unassigned')
ORDER BY ap.startdate, SUM(tal.amount) DESC

SELECT
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('Income', 'OthIncome') THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'COGS' THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS cogs,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('Expense', 'OthExpense') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS operating_expense,
    SUM(-tal.amount) AS net_income
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = tal.transaction AND tl.id = tal.transactionline
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype IN ('Income', 'OthIncome', 'COGS', 'Expense', 'OthExpense')
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)
ORDER BY SUM(-tal.amount) DESC

SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    SUM(-tl.netamount) AS tax_collected,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS taxed_transactions
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE t.posting = 'T'
    AND t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred')
    AND tl.taxline = 'T'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate
ORDER BY ap.startdate

SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred') THEN -tl.netamount ELSE 0 END) AS tax_collected_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('VendBill', 'VendCred') THEN tl.netamount ELSE 0 END) AS tax_paid_purchases,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred') THEN -tl.netamount ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('VendBill', 'VendCred') THEN tl.netamount ELSE 0 END) AS net_tax_position
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE t.posting = 'T'
    AND t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred', 'VendBill', 'VendCred')
    AND tl.taxline = 'T'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate
ORDER BY ap.startdate

SELECT
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    ap.startdate AS period_start,
    CASE WHEN ap.closed = 'T' THEN 'Closed' ELSE 'Open' END AS period_status,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS posted_transactions,
    NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount > 0 THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_debits,
    NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount < 0 THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_credits
FROM accountingperiod ap
LEFT JOIN transaction t ON t.postingperiod = ap.id AND t.posting = 'T'
LEFT JOIN transactionaccountingline tal ON tal.transaction = t.id AND tal.posting = 'T'
WHERE ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate, CASE WHEN ap.closed = 'T' THEN 'Closed' ELSE 'Open' END
ORDER BY ap.startdate

SELECT
    cur.periodname AS period_name,
    cur.revenue AS revenue,
    NVL(prev.revenue, 0) AS prior_period_revenue,
    cur.revenue - NVL(prev.revenue, 0) AS revenue_delta,
    CASE WHEN NVL(prev.revenue, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((cur.revenue - prev.revenue) / ABS(prev.revenue) * 100, 2) END AS pct_change
FROM (
    SELECT ap.periodname AS periodname, ap.startdate AS startdate, SUM(-tal.amount) AS revenue
    FROM transactionaccountingline tal
    JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
    JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
    JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
    WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
        AND a.accttype = 'Income'
        AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate
) cur
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ap.periodname AS periodname, ap.startdate AS startdate, SUM(-tal.amount) AS revenue
    FROM transactionaccountingline tal
    JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
    JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
    JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
    WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
        AND a.accttype = 'Income'
        AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    GROUP BY ap.periodname, ap.startdate
) prev ON prev.startdate = ADD_MONTHS(cur.startdate, -1)
WHERE cur.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND cur.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY cur.startdate

SELECT
    t.tranid AS document_number,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.type) AS transaction_type,
    t.trandate AS transaction_date,
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS trandate_month,
    ap.periodname AS posting_period,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary,
    t.foreigntotal AS document_total
FROM transaction t
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id AND tl.mainline = 'T'
WHERE t.posting = 'T'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') <> TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'YYYY-MM')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY t.trandate DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'YYYY') || '-Q' || TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'Q') AS fiscal_quarter,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'COGS' THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS cogs,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype IN ('Expense', 'OthExpense') THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS operating_expense,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'Income' THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN a.accttype = 'COGS' THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS gross_profit
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.isquarter = 'F'
    AND ap.isyear = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'YYYY') || '-Q' || TO_CHAR(ap.startdate, 'Q')
ORDER BY MIN(ap.startdate)

SELECT
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary,
    ap.periodname AS period_name,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS tax_collected_base_currency,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS taxed_transactions
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE t.posting = 'T'
    AND t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CustCred')
    AND tl.taxline = 'T'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
    AND ap.startdate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND ap.startdate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary), ap.periodname, ap.startdate
ORDER BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary), ap.startdate

SELECT
    a.accttype AS account_type,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount > 0 THEN tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_debits,
    SUM(CASE WHEN tal.amount < 0 THEN -tal.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_credits,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS net_movement
FROM transactionaccountingline tal
JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tal.transaction
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE tal.posting = 'T'
    AND ap.periodname = 'Jan 2026'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
GROUP BY a.accttype
ORDER BY a.accttype

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    loc.name AS location_name,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS qty_on_hand,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS qty_available,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) - SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS qty_committed_or_held
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item it ON it.id = ib.item
JOIN location loc ON loc.id = ib.location
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
GROUP BY it.itemid, it.displayname, loc.name
ORDER BY it.itemid, loc.name
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS total_on_hand,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS total_available,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ib.location) AS stocked_locations
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item it ON it.id = ib.item
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
GROUP BY it.itemid, it.displayname
HAVING SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) < 100
ORDER BY SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    loc.name AS location_name,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS qty_on_hand,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS qty_available
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item it ON it.id = ib.item
JOIN location loc ON loc.id = ib.location
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
GROUP BY it.itemid, it.displayname, loc.name
HAVING SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) <= 0
ORDER BY SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    loc.name AS location_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ib.item) AS distinct_items,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS units_on_hand,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS units_available,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) - SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS units_committed,
    ROUND(100 * SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) /
        (SELECT SUM(NVL(b2.quantityonhand, 0)) FROM inventorybalance b2), 2) AS pct_of_company_units
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN location loc ON loc.id = ib.location
GROUP BY loc.name
ORDER BY SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) DESC

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    loc.name AS location_name,
    locagg.loc_units AS units_at_location,
    itemagg.total_units AS total_units,
    ROUND(100 * locagg.loc_units / itemagg.total_units, 1) AS pct_at_location
FROM (
    SELECT ib.item AS item, ib.location AS location,
        SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS loc_units
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item, ib.location
) locagg
JOIN (
    SELECT ib2.item AS item, SUM(NVL(ib2.quantityonhand, 0)) AS total_units
    FROM inventorybalance ib2
    GROUP BY ib2.item
    HAVING SUM(NVL(ib2.quantityonhand, 0)) > 0
) itemagg ON itemagg.item = locagg.item
JOIN item it ON it.id = locagg.item
JOIN location loc ON loc.id = locagg.location
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND 100 * locagg.loc_units / itemagg.total_units >= 100
ORDER BY 100 * locagg.loc_units / itemagg.total_units DESC, itemagg.total_units DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS qty_on_hand,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS qty_available,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) - SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS qty_committed,
    ROUND(100 * (SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) - SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)))
        / SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)), 1) AS pct_committed
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item it ON it.id = ib.item
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
GROUP BY it.itemid, it.displayname
HAVING SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) > 0
    AND SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) - SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) - SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) AS total_units_on_hand,
    SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS total_units_available,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ib.location) AS stocked_locations
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item it ON it.id = ib.item
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
GROUP BY it.itemid, it.displayname
ORDER BY SUM(NVL(ib.quantityonhand, 0)) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    loc.name AS stockout_location,
    here.avail_here AS available_at_location,
    tot.total_avail - here.avail_here AS available_elsewhere
FROM (
    SELECT ib.item AS item, ib.location AS location,
        SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS avail_here
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item, ib.location
    HAVING SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) <= 0
) here
JOIN (
    SELECT ib2.item AS item, SUM(NVL(ib2.quantityavailable, 0)) AS total_avail
    FROM inventorybalance ib2
    GROUP BY ib2.item
) tot ON tot.item = here.item
JOIN item it ON it.id = here.item
JOIN location loc ON loc.id = here.location
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND tot.total_avail - here.avail_here > 0
ORDER BY tot.total_avail - here.avail_here DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    it.itemid AS item_sku,
    it.displayname AS item_name,
    NVL(inv.available_units, 0) AS qty_available,
    sales.units_sold_90d AS units_sold_90d,
    ROUND(sales.units_sold_90d / 90, 2) AS avg_daily_units,
    ROUND(NVL(inv.available_units, 0) * 90 / sales.units_sold_90d, 1) AS days_of_cover
FROM (
    SELECT tl.item AS item, SUM(-tl.quantity) AS units_sold_90d
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
    WHERE t.type IN ('CustInvc', 'CashSale')
        AND tl.mainline = 'F'
        AND tl.taxline = 'F'
        AND t.trandate >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 90
    GROUP BY tl.item
    HAVING SUM(-tl.quantity) > 0
) sales
JOIN item it ON it.id = sales.item
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ib.item AS item, SUM(NVL(ib.quantityavailable, 0)) AS available_units
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item
) inv ON inv.item = sales.item
WHERE it.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND NVL(inv.available_units, 0) * 90 < 100 * sales.units_sold_90d
ORDER BY NVL(inv.available_units, 0) * 90 / sales.units_sold_90d ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS ship_month,
    SUM(-tl.quantity) AS units_shipped
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'ItemShip'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY itm.itemid, TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY itm.itemid, TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    v.entityid AS vendor_name,
    SUM(tl.quantity) AS units_received,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS receipt_count
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = tl.item
JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'ItemRcpt'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY itm.itemid, v.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(tl.quantity) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemRcpt' THEN tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS units_received,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS units_shipped,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemRcpt' THEN tl.quantity ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS net_movement
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type IN ('ItemRcpt', 'ItemShip')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY itm.itemid
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemRcpt' THEN tl.quantity ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) DESC

SELECT
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.location) AS location_name,
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS move_month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS units_shipped,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemRcpt' THEN tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS units_received
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type IN ('ItemShip', 'ItemRcpt')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND tl.location IS NOT NULL
    AND itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.location), TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY BUILTIN.DF(tl.location), TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN t.trandate END) AS last_ship_date,
    MAX(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemRcpt' THEN t.trandate END) AS last_receipt_date,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - MAX(t.trandate) AS days_since_any_movement
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type IN ('ItemShip', 'ItemRcpt')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
GROUP BY itm.itemid
ORDER BY TRUNC(SYSDATE) - MAX(t.trandate) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    itm.displayname AS item_description,
    SUM(ib.quantityonhand) AS on_hand_units
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = ib.item
WHERE itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM transactionline tl
        JOIN transaction t ON t.id = tl.transaction
        WHERE tl.item = ib.item
            AND t.type = 'ItemShip'
            AND tl.mainline = 'F'
            AND tl.taxline = 'F'
            AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    )
GROUP BY itm.itemid, itm.displayname
HAVING SUM(ib.quantityonhand) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(ib.quantityonhand) DESC

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    oh.on_hand_units AS on_hand_units,
    NVL(sh.units_shipped_12m, 0) AS units_shipped_12m,
    CASE WHEN NVL(sh.units_shipped_12m, 0) <= 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(oh.on_hand_units / (sh.units_shipped_12m / 12), 1) END AS months_of_cover
FROM item itm
JOIN (
    SELECT ib.item AS item, SUM(ib.quantityonhand) AS on_hand_units
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item
) oh ON oh.item = itm.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT tl.item AS item, SUM(-tl.quantity) AS units_shipped_12m
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
    WHERE t.type = 'ItemShip'
        AND tl.mainline = 'F'
        AND tl.taxline = 'F'
        AND t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), -12)
    GROUP BY tl.item
) sh ON sh.item = itm.id
WHERE itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND oh.on_hand_units > 0
ORDER BY CASE WHEN NVL(sh.units_shipped_12m, 0) <= 0 THEN 999999
    ELSE oh.on_hand_units / (sh.units_shipped_12m / 12) END DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    itm.itemid AS item_name,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary_name,
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS ship_month,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS cogs_posted
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionaccountingline tal ON tal.transaction = t.id
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = tal.transaction
    AND tl.id = tal.transactionline
JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
JOIN item itm ON itm.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'ItemShip'
    AND tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype = 'COGS'
    AND itm.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY itm.itemid, BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary), TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY SUM(tal.amount) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS po_month,
    COUNT(*) AS po_count,
    SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS po_total
FROM transaction t
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'PurchOrd'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY v.entityid, TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY v.entityid, TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    t.tranid AS po_number,
    t.trandate AS po_date,
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency,
    t.foreigntotal AS po_total
FROM transaction t
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'PurchOrd'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY t.foreigntotal DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    COUNT(*) AS po_count,
    SUM(t.foreigntotal) AS total_po_value,
    ROUND(AVG(t.foreigntotal), 2) AS avg_po_value,
    MAX(t.foreigntotal) AS largest_po
FROM transaction t
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'PurchOrd'
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY v.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(t.foreigntotal) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.tranid AS po_number,
    t.trandate AS po_date,
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary,
    t.foreigntotal AS po_total,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate AS age_days
FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id AND tl.mainline = 'T'
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'PurchOrd'
    AND t.status IN ('B', 'D', 'E', 'F')
ORDER BY t.trandate

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    TO_CHAR(r.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS receipt_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS receipt_count,
    SUM(rl.quantity) AS units_received
FROM transaction r
    JOIN transactionline rl ON rl.transaction = r.id AND rl.mainline = 'F' AND rl.taxline = 'F'
    JOIN item i ON i.id = rl.item
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = r.entity
WHERE r.type = 'ItemRcpt'
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly', 'NonInvtPart')
    AND r.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND r.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY v.entityid, TO_CHAR(r.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')
ORDER BY v.entityid, TO_CHAR(r.trandate, 'YYYY-MM')

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'PurchOrd' THEN t.foreigntotal ELSE 0 END) AS po_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'VendBill' THEN -t.foreigntotal ELSE 0 END) AS billed_total,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'PurchOrd' THEN t.foreigntotal ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'VendBill' THEN -t.foreigntotal ELSE 0 END)
            / SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'PurchOrd' THEN t.foreigntotal ELSE 0 END), 4)
    END AS bill_to_po_ratio
FROM transaction t
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type IN ('PurchOrd', 'VendBill')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY v.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'PurchOrd' THEN t.foreigntotal ELSE 0 END) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    a.accttype AS account_type,
    SUM(tal.amount) AS posted_amount
FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionaccountingline tal ON tal.transaction = t.id
    JOIN account a ON a.id = tal.account
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = t.entity
    JOIN accountingperiod ap ON ap.id = t.postingperiod
WHERE t.type = 'VendBill'
    AND tal.posting = 'T'
    AND a.accttype <> 'AcctPay'
    AND ap.periodname = 'Jan 2026'
    AND ap.isadjust = 'F'
GROUP BY v.entityid, a.accttype
ORDER BY SUM(tal.amount) DESC

SELECT
    v.entityid AS vendor,
    COUNT(*) AS receipt_events,
    ROUND(AVG(x.lead_days), 1) AS avg_lead_days,
    MAX(x.lead_days) AS worst_lead_days
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        r.id AS receipt_id,
        p.id AS po_id,
        p.entity AS vendor_id,
        (r.trandate - p.trandate) AS lead_days
    FROM transaction r
        JOIN transactionline rl ON rl.transaction = r.id AND rl.mainline = 'F'
        JOIN transaction p ON p.id = rl.createdfrom AND p.type = 'PurchOrd'
    WHERE r.type = 'ItemRcpt'
        AND r.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        AND r.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
) x
    JOIN vendor v ON v.id = x.vendor_id
GROUP BY v.entityid
ORDER BY ROUND(AVG(x.lead_days), 1) DESC

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item,
    i.itemtype AS item_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS po_count,
    SUM(tl.quantity) AS qty_ordered,
    SUM(tl.netamount) AS po_line_amount
FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id AND tl.mainline = 'F' AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'PurchOrd'
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly', 'NonInvtPart', 'Service')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY i.itemid, i.itemtype
ORDER BY SUM(tl.netamount) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.tranid AS order_number,
    t.trandate AS order_date,
    c.entityid AS customer,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS order_status,
    t.foreigntotal AS order_total,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.currency) AS currency
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
    AND t.status IN ('A', 'B', 'D', 'E', 'F')
ORDER BY t.trandate ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS order_month,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary) AS subsidiary,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS order_count,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS booked_value_base
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND i.itemtype NOT IN ('Subtotal', 'Markup', 'Discount', 'Description', 'Payment')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'), BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'), BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item,
    i.itemtype AS item_type,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'SalesOrd' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS ordered_units,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS shipped_units,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'SalesOrd' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS unfulfilled_units_proxy
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type IN ('SalesOrd', 'ItemShip')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly', 'Kit')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY i.itemid, i.itemtype
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'SalesOrd' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'SalesOrd' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'ItemShip' THEN -tl.quantity ELSE 0 END) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.tranid AS order_number,
    t.trandate AS order_date,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate AS days_open,
    c.entityid AS customer,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS order_status,
    t.foreigntotal AS order_total
FROM transaction t
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
    AND t.status IN ('B', 'D', 'E')
ORDER BY t.trandate ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS ship_month,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.location) AS location,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS fulfillment_count,
    SUM(-tl.quantity) AS units_shipped
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'ItemShip'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly', 'Kit')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'), BUILTIN.DF(tl.location)
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'), BUILTIN.DF(tl.location)

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item,
    d.open_so_units AS open_so_units,
    NVL(b.qty_available, 0) AS qty_available,
    d.open_so_units - NVL(b.qty_available, 0) AS shortfall_units
FROM (
    SELECT
        tl.item AS item,
        SUM(-tl.quantity) AS open_so_units
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
    WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
        AND t.status IN ('B', 'D', 'E')
        AND tl.mainline = 'F'
        AND tl.taxline = 'F'
        AND tl.isclosed = 'F'
    GROUP BY tl.item
) d
JOIN item i ON i.id = d.item
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ib.item AS item,
        SUM(ib.quantityavailable) AS qty_available
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item
) b ON b.item = d.item
WHERE i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly')
    AND d.open_so_units - NVL(b.qty_available, 0) > 100
ORDER BY d.open_so_units - NVL(b.qty_available, 0) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    c.entityid AS customer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS open_orders,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS open_backlog_base
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN customer c ON c.id = t.entity
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
    AND t.status IN ('B', 'D', 'E')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND tl.isclosed = 'F'
    AND i.itemtype NOT IN ('Subtotal', 'Markup', 'Discount', 'Description', 'Payment')
GROUP BY c.entityid
ORDER BY SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate <= 7 THEN '0-7 days'
        WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate <= 14 THEN '8-14 days'
        WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate <= 30 THEN '15-30 days'
        ELSE '31+ days'
    END AS age_bucket,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS open_orders,
    SUM(-tl.netamount * t.exchangerate) AS backlog_value_base
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
    AND t.status IN ('B', 'D', 'E')
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND tl.isclosed = 'F'
    AND i.itemtype NOT IN ('Subtotal', 'Markup', 'Discount', 'Description', 'Payment')
GROUP BY CASE
        WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate <= 7 THEN '0-7 days'
        WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate <= 14 THEN '8-14 days'
        WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate <= 30 THEN '15-30 days'
        ELSE '31+ days'
    END
ORDER BY MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate)

SELECT
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM') AS transfer_month,
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.location) AS from_location,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.transferlocation) AS to_location,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS transfer_order_count,
    SUM(-tl.quantity) AS total_units_transferred
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'TrnfrOrd'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND tl.quantity < 0
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly', 'Kit')
    AND t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
    AND t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'),
    BUILTIN.DF(tl.location),
    BUILTIN.DF(t.transferlocation)
ORDER BY
    TO_CHAR(t.trandate, 'YYYY-MM'),
    SUM(-tl.quantity) DESC

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item_sku,
    i.displayname AS item_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS transfer_order_count,
    SUM(-tl.quantity) AS total_units_transferred
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
JOIN item i ON i.id = tl.item
WHERE t.type = 'TrnfrOrd'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND tl.quantity < 0
    AND i.itemtype IN ('InvtPart', 'Assembly', 'Kit')
    AND t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -6)
GROUP BY
    i.itemid,
    i.displayname
ORDER BY SUM(-tl.quantity) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    t.tranid AS transfer_number,
    t.trandate AS order_date,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate AS days_open,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status) AS status_label,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.transferlocation) AS to_location,
    MIN(BUILTIN.DF(tl.location)) AS from_location,
    MIN(BUILTIN.DF(tl.subsidiary)) AS subsidiary_name,
    SUM(-tl.quantity) AS ordered_units,
    SUM(NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) AS shipped_units,
    SUM(-tl.quantity - NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) AS remaining_units
FROM transaction t
JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
WHERE t.type = 'TrnfrOrd'
    AND tl.mainline = 'F'
    AND tl.taxline = 'F'
    AND tl.quantity < 0
    AND tl.isclosed = 'F'
GROUP BY
    t.tranid,
    t.trandate,
    TRUNC(SYSDATE) - t.trandate,
    BUILTIN.DF(t.status),
    BUILTIN.DF(t.transferlocation)
HAVING SUM(-tl.quantity - NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY t.trandate ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    BUILTIN.DF(x.from_loc) AS from_location,
    BUILTIN.DF(x.to_loc) AS to_location,
    COUNT(x.ful_id) AS fulfillment_count,
    ROUND(AVG(x.ship_date - x.order_date), 1) AS avg_days_order_to_ship,
    MAX(x.ship_date - x.order_date) AS max_days_order_to_ship
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        if_t.id AS ful_id,
        if_t.trandate AS ship_date,
        to_t.trandate AS order_date,
        tol.location AS from_loc,
        to_t.transferlocation AS to_loc
    FROM transaction if_t
    JOIN transactionline ifl ON ifl.transaction = if_t.id
        AND ifl.mainline = 'F'
        AND ifl.taxline = 'F'
    JOIN transaction to_t ON to_t.id = ifl.createdfrom
        AND to_t.type = 'TrnfrOrd'
    JOIN transactionline tol ON tol.transaction = to_t.id
        AND tol.mainline = 'T'
    WHERE if_t.type = 'ItemShip'
        AND if_t.trandate >= TO_DATE('2025-07-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        AND if_t.trandate <= TO_DATE('2026-06-30', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
) x
GROUP BY
    BUILTIN.DF(x.from_loc),
    BUILTIN.DF(x.to_loc)
ORDER BY AVG(x.ship_date - x.order_date) DESC

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item_sku,
    i.displayname AS item_name,
    NVL(oh.qty_on_hand, 0) AS qty_on_hand,
    NVL(oh.qty_available, 0) AS qty_available,
    NVL(so.open_so_qty, 0) AS open_demand_qty,
    NVL(po.open_po_qty, 0) AS open_supply_qty,
    NVL(oh.qty_available, 0) + NVL(po.open_po_qty, 0) - NVL(so.open_so_qty, 0) AS projected_net_position
FROM item i
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ib.item AS item,
        SUM(ib.quantityonhand) AS qty_on_hand,
        SUM(ib.quantityavailable) AS qty_available
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item
) oh ON oh.item = i.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        tl.item AS item,
        SUM(-tl.quantity - NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) AS open_so_qty
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
    WHERE t.type = 'SalesOrd'
        AND tl.mainline = 'F'
        AND tl.taxline = 'F'
        AND tl.isclosed = 'F'
        AND tl.quantity < 0
    GROUP BY tl.item
    HAVING SUM(-tl.quantity - NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) > 0
) so ON so.item = i.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        tl.item AS item,
        SUM(tl.quantity - NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) AS open_po_qty
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
    WHERE t.type = 'PurchOrd'
        AND tl.mainline = 'F'
        AND tl.taxline = 'F'
        AND tl.isclosed = 'F'
        AND tl.quantity > 0
    GROUP BY tl.item
    HAVING SUM(tl.quantity - NVL(tl.quantityshiprecv, 0)) > 0
) po ON po.item = i.id
WHERE i.itemtype = 'InvtPart'
    AND (NVL(so.open_so_qty, 0) > 0 OR NVL(po.open_po_qty, 0) > 0)
ORDER BY NVL(oh.qty_available, 0) + NVL(po.open_po_qty, 0) - NVL(so.open_so_qty, 0) ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item_sku,
    i.displayname AS item_name,
    NVL(oh.qty_available, 0) AS qty_available,
    ROUND(sh.shipped_qty_6m / 6, 1) AS avg_monthly_shipped_qty,
    ROUND(NVL(oh.qty_available, 0) / (sh.shipped_qty_6m / 6), 1) AS months_of_cover
FROM item i
JOIN (
    SELECT
        tl.item AS item,
        SUM(-tl.quantity) AS shipped_qty_6m
    FROM transaction t
    JOIN transactionline tl ON tl.transaction = t.id
    WHERE t.type = 'ItemShip'
        AND tl.mainline = 'F'
        AND tl.taxline = 'F'
        AND tl.quantity < 0
        AND t.trandate >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -6)
        AND t.trandate < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
    GROUP BY tl.item
    HAVING SUM(-tl.quantity) > 0
) sh ON sh.item = i.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ib.item AS item,
        SUM(ib.quantityavailable) AS qty_available
    FROM inventorybalance ib
    GROUP BY ib.item
) oh ON oh.item = i.id
WHERE i.itemtype = 'InvtPart'
ORDER BY ROUND(NVL(oh.qty_available, 0) / (sh.shipped_qty_6m / 6), 1) ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
    i.itemid AS item_sku,
    i.displayname AS item_name,
    BUILTIN.DF(ib.location) AS location_name,
    SUM(ib.quantityonhand) AS qty_on_hand_here,
    SUM(ib.quantityavailable) AS qty_available_here,
    MAX(co.total_available) AS qty_available_companywide,
    MAX(co.total_available) - SUM(ib.quantityavailable) AS qty_available_elsewhere
FROM inventorybalance ib
JOIN item i ON i.id = ib.item
JOIN (
    SELECT
        ib2.item AS item,
        SUM(ib2.quantityavailable) AS total_available
    FROM inventorybalance ib2
    GROUP BY ib2.item
) co ON co.item = ib.item
WHERE i.itemtype = 'InvtPart'
GROUP BY
    i.itemid,
    i.displayname,
    BUILTIN.DF(ib.location)
HAVING SUM(ib.quantityavailable) < 100
    AND MAX(co.total_available) > 100
ORDER BY SUM(ib.quantityavailable) ASC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
